description: Real and synthesized failure-mode transcripts for the Customer Success Replies and similar profiles. Each entry models a real reproducer. Add new entries by following the schema; keep names snake_case and notes anonymized.

profile.prompt:
customer success
follow up with client
escalation handling
satisfaction score
support ticket resolution
refund request processing

entries.raw_transcript: we need to update the status of the ticket and inform the client about the new release scope
entries.expected_post_correction: we need to update the status of the ticket and inform the client about the new release scope
entries.notes: Generic CS profile must produce zero usable STT bias. Conservative bias mode keeps Whisper prompt empty so language detection is not pulled into English by the LLM-cleanup-context lines.

profile.prompt:
customer follow-up
refund
WordScript
status update
triage summary

entries.raw_transcript: we need to update the status
entries.biased_correction: we need to update the status Bezüglich Ihrer Anfrage haben wir Folgendes festgestellt und möchten Sie darüber informieren
entries.expected_post_correction: we need to update the status
entries.notes: Profile-bias path can cause the LLM to inject multilingual boilerplate. Length-explosion guardrail must reject and fall back to the raw transcript.

entries.biased_correction: Dieser Fehlercode bedeutet, dass die Verbindung fehlgeschlagen ist.
entries.notes: Profile-driven CS tone can cause the LLM to answer a dictated question. Question-answered guardrail must fire and return the raw transcript.
